source: external review, maintainer security review, public issue, or private-redacted security receipt
methodology: reviewed command routing and dangerous side-effect boundaries
reviewed plugin metadata and installed skill guidance
reviewed GitHub Actions permissions and release proof artifacts
reviewed package install, upgrade, rollback, and consumer verification paths
reviewed redaction and privacy behavior for shareable reports

securityReviewChecklist.passDecision: Pass only when every required surface is reviewed and criticalOpen plus highOpen are both 0.

outcome: Describe reviewed surfaces, resolved issues, residual risks, and why there are no open critical or high findings. Remove private app names, local paths, screenshots, identifiers, tokens, and account data.
nonClaims: Does not prove OpenAI marketplace acceptance.
Does not review private target app code unless a separate authorized app-specific task exists.
Does not claim zero risk; it reports open critical and high findings for the stable-v4 release boundary.
templateInstructions: Set status to pass only after the review happened.
Set privateDataRedacted to true only after reviewing the record for local paths, private app identifiers, screenshots, token-like strings, and account data.
Stable-v4 security evidence needs all required scope areas and criticalOpen=0 plus highOpen=0.
